title: Voting of shareholders and bondholders
doc_html:
§75.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1970, No. 50, §4, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M.; Acts 1987, No. 62, §3, eff. June 11, 1987; Acts 1988, No. 173, §3, eff. June 29, 1988; Acts 1988, No. 455, §1, eff. July 10, 1988; Acts 1993, No. 983, §1, eff. June 25, 1993; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
